body_transformation: Chansey's rounded plump body now exhibits a sleek, taut texture with electric blue and vibrant yellow circuit patterns tracing along its pale cream curves, replacing the soft cream coloration. The pointed rabbit ears retain their shape but feature sharp, jagged lightning-bolt spines along the outer edges and neon green sparking tips. The curled spiral tail tip now glows with vibrant yellow energy, its pale cream tip replaced by a shimmering electric blue core. The low plump stance is maintained but with a leaner, wiry frame that enhances the electric blue circuit patterns across its body.
signature_feature: Tail tip: electric blue core with vibrant yellow energy sparks and neon green circuit patterns.
